description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses Maven Docker images for JDK 7 and JDK 8, caches the local Maven repository, defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables, and has two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a validate:jdk7 job using image maven:3.3.9-jdk-7 that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS install", and a validate:jdk8 job using image maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 that runs the same command. In the test stage add a verify:jdk7 job using image maven:3.3.9-jdk-7 that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify site site:stage" and is excluded from the master branch, and a verify:jdk8 job using image maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 that runs the same command and is also excluded from master. The pipeline caches "/root/.m2/repository/" between jobs.
